extortion.description: "Genpro, Inc. is an integrated 3PL with over 30 years of experience and a deep bench of proven professionals on both the shipper and carrier side. Real-time market intelligence keeps our shippers and carriers up-to-date on current pricing, availability and market trends. Our advanced technology facilitates data connectivity across platforms and systems. We're recognized as a trusted advisor, liaison, and partner for logistics planning and solutions in the most demanding, competitive and time sensitive applications."
